description:
The nfs-common package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove nfs-common
rationale:
If the system does not export NFS shares or act as an NFS client, it is
recommended that these services be removed to reduce the remote attack
surface.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the nfs-common package is installed: 
$ rpm -q nfs-common
fixtext:
To remove the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package nfs-common run the following command:

$ sudo dnf remove nfs-common
title: Uninstall nfs-common Package
